texto: Ruby poked at her rice, her mind racing. Perhaps he'd mistaken her for someone who had done a massage course or was qualified to give spriritual advice. She could only give advice on spirits, and only then if they were alcoholic.
explicacao: Citação de Lia Weston sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Ruby poked at her rice, her mind racing. Perhaps he'd mistaken her for someone who had done a mas…” articula reflexao, humour, advice em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
